fundingMilestone.title: Funding milestone reached
fundingMilestone.body: One of your opportunities has reached a new investor milestone.

opportunityPublished.title: Opportunity published
opportunityPublished.body: A new investment opportunity is now visible to investors.

distributionReady.title: Distribution update available
distributionReady.body: A profit distribution activity requires your review.

withdrawalInProgress.title: Withdrawal request in progress
withdrawalInProgress.body: A withdrawal request was updated and needs operational follow-up.

withdrawalDeposited.title: Withdrawal deposit completed
withdrawalDeposited.body: A withdrawal request has been marked as deposited successfully.

kycApproved.title: User verification completed
kycApproved.body: A user verification request was approved and added to the active users list.

activityReview.title: Activity requires review
activityReview.body: A recent backoffice activity was flagged for review in the activity log.

systemUpdate.title: System update
systemUpdate.body: A new operational update was added to your notifications feed.

newUserRequest.title: New user request
newUserRequest.body: A new user-related request is ready for follow-up from the users module.

liveOperationalAlert.title: New live alert
liveOperationalAlert.body: A real-time notification has just arrived in the notifications bar.

notificationsPage.description: Review every notification in one place and open the related activity from the list.

empty.title: No notifications yet
empty.description: New alerts will appear here as soon as they arrive.
